event_name: UFC Fight Night: Prochazka vs. Ulberg

key_factors: Prochazka's unorthodox striking creates serious problems for linear fighters
Ulberg has never faced a striker with Jiri's chaos and unpredictability
Prochazka's finishing ability is elite — 9 of 16 wins by KO/TKO
Ulberg is durable but gets touched clean by pressure fighters
predictions.analysis: Prochazka brings a level of striking unpredictability that Ulberg has never faced. Jiri's style is disorganized by design — angles, pace changes, and constant finish hunting. Ulberg is a solid striker but linear. Lean toward Prochazka by stoppage, with medium volatility — Jiri can get hit clean too.

key_factors: Allen's grappling is elite — 11 submission wins
Curtis has been finished on the ground before
predictions.analysis: Allen is a submission specialist and Curtis has shown vulnerability on the ground. If Allen gets this to the mat, he wins. High confidence lean with finish upside.

key_factors: Almeida's wrestling and pressure game neutralizes Dolidze's power
Dolidze tends to fade late — Almeida thrives in championship rounds
Model and sharp money aligned on Almeida
predictions.analysis: Almeida is the more complete fighter. His wrestling, volume, and durability stack up well against Dolidze's one-dimensional power game. Strong lean on Almeida by decision.

key_factors: Mokaev's grappling volume smothers striker-types like Kape
Kape's power is real but Mokaev doesn't stand and trade
Lean toward Mokaev if he controls pace and distance
predictions.analysis: Mokaev is a grappling machine. Kape has knockout power but Mokaev will drag this into uncomfortable territory and grind out rounds. Lean Mokaev.

key_factors: Fakhretdinov is a dominant wrestler making his UFC debut with elite credentials
Hafez is stepping up in competition significantly
predictions.analysis: Fakhretdinov is a decorated wrestler with serious credentials. Hafez has not faced this level of wrestling. Strong lean on Fakhretdinov to control and win by decision.

two_leg.note: Both LOCK tier. Allen's submission threat + Fakhretdinov's wrestling dominance.

three_leg.note: All three LOCK tier. Strong card for disciplined parlay construction.
